description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated human figure with arms crossed atop a large inscribed tablet or stela. The figure has detailed facial features, including a stylized wig or headdress, and bare feet resting on a rectangular base. The front of the tablet is covered in rows of carved hieroglyphic script, suggesting an ancient Egyptian style. The sculpture is made from a dark, stone-like material with a weathered, matte finish, and the surface shows signs of age and wear. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with a smooth, rounded contour and minimal ornamentation. The overall form is blocky and solid, giving the impression of significant weight and durability.
description: A dark stone sculpture of a seated human figure with crossed arms atop an inscribed tablet, featuring detailed facial features and hieroglyphic carvings on the front.
description_view_0: The left rear view shows the back and side of the figure, highlighting the smooth, unadorned surface and the rounded back of the head.
description_view_1: The front-left view displays the detailed face, crossed arms, and the inscribed tablet with visible hieroglyphs, as well as the bare feet resting on the base.
description_view_2: The front-right view emphasizes the facial features, the full expanse of the inscribed tablet, and the feet, with the right side of the sculpture visible.
description_view_3: The right rear view reveals the back and side of the sculpture, showing the smooth, less detailed surface and the rounded back of the head.
attribute_subject_matter: seated human figure with inscribed tablet
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
